sentence: Ownership of the website
In compliance with the provisions of Law 34/2002, of July 11, on information society services and electronic commerce, the general information data of this website are indicated:
Domain: www.mduse.com
Company name: MD. USE INNOVATIONS, S.L.
Address: Edificio Emprendeia s/n (15706 Santiago de Compostela)
Email: regafandi@gmail.com
Registration data in the Commercial Registry: VOLUME: 255, FOLIO: 219, SECTION: 8, PAGE: 47840, REGISTRATION: 5
Intellectual and industrial property

The design of the portal and its source codes, as well as the logos, brands and other possible distinctive signs that may appear therein, belong to the entity itself and are protected and covered by the corresponding intellectual and industrial property rights.
Responsibility for the contents

The entity does not guarantee continued access, nor the correct display, possible download or usefulness of the elements and information contained on the website, which may be impeded, hindered or interrupted by factors or circumstances beyond its control.

On the other hand, the entity is not responsible for the legality of other third-party websites from which this portal can be accessed. Likewise, this same entity is not responsible for the legality of other third-party websites that may be linked or linked from this web portal.

In addition, it reserves the right to make changes to the website without prior notice, in order to keep its information up to date, adding, modifying, correcting or eliminating the published content or the design of the portal.

Furthermore, the entity will not be responsible for the use that third parties make of the information published on the portal, nor for the damages suffered or economic losses that, directly or indirectly, produce or may produce economic, material, data, etc. damages, caused by the use of said information.
Reproduction of content
The total or partial reproduction of the contents published on the portal itself is prohibited.
Possible existence of links, hyperlinks or hypertext links
The owner, through this portal, may provide you with access to third-party websites through links, in order to inform you about the existence of other sources of information on the Internet.

These possible links to other websites would not in any case constitute a suggestion or recommendation for you to visit the destination web pages, which would be beyond the control of the owner, so this entity would not be responsible for the content of such linked websites or the result obtained by following the aforementioned links.
Likewise, this entity would not be responsible for the links or hypertext links located on the linked websites to which it may provide you access.

The possible establishment of the link does not imply in any case the existence of relations between the owner and the owner of the site on which the link is established, nor the acceptance or approval by the owner of its contents or services. If you access an external website from a link that may be found on this website, due to its impact, you must read and take into account the policies in force for the other website involved.
Applicable law

The applicable law in the event of a dispute or conflict of interpretation of the terms that make up this legal notice, as well as any other issue related to the services or contents of this portal, will be Spanish law.
Development and impact
This notice will be or may be affected, developed, completed and supplemented by other conditions, notices, terms and policies that are established or may be established on this website.
PRIVACY POLICY

Due to the validity of the General Data Protection Regulation 2016/679 (RGPD) and Organic Law 3/2018, on the Protection of Personal Data and Guarantee of Digital Rights (LOPDGDD), this privacy policy has been updated. Below is information related to the data processing carried out by MD. USE INNOVATIONS, S.L.
DATA CONTROLLER
The Data Controller is the owner of this website, whose full details are listed in the Legal Notice.
NOTICE, POLICY AND SECURITY MEASURES.

The data controller, taking into account the nature, scope, context and purposes of the processing, has implemented all technical and organisational measures to ensure correct compliance with data protection regulations. This is in accordance with the provisions of Articles 24 and following of the General Data Protection Regulation and Article 28 of Organic Law 3/2018.
Likewise, the application of the processing of personal data is guaranteed.
DATA CATEGORY, PURPOSE AND LEGITIMATION OF PROCESSING.
This website has the following forms in which different types of data are collected, depending on the purpose:
Contact form: identification, contact and other data that the user may provide. They will be used to respond to queries.

Registration form: identification, contact, billing and payment method, commercial and service data. They will be used to create a user account that allows you to access the functionalities of our website as a customer, and thus be able to provide you with the services offered. Also for administrative management purposes and after-sales and loyalty services.

Candidate form: identification, contact, academic, work experience and other data that may be included in a resume. They will be used in the personnel selection processes of the person responsible or others related to the management of human resources.
Content subscription form: contact details. They will be used for the periodic sending of newsletters and other information requested by the user.
Reservation form: identification and contact details. They will be used for the realization, modification or deletion of reservations.

Promotions or raffles: identification and contact details. They will be used for the realization of the raffles and the communication with the winners, as indicated in the specific bases of each promotion.

Complaints channel: identification, contact details, data of commission of crimes or infractions and others that may be cited in a complaint. They will be used for the administrative management, investigation and resolution of the complaints sent.

The legitimacy of these treatments is the informed and free consent that the user must express before sending any information through the form. This consent can be withdrawn at any time without affecting the treatments carried out previously. Other treatments can also be carried out based on compliance with legal obligations or contractual execution, where applicable.
In addition, the website may obtain information through cookies (see cookie policy).
ORIGIN AND CATEGORIES OF DATA PROCESSED.

The personal data comes directly from the interested party. In the event that in any case it is obtained through other sources, the appropriate information will be provided on such origin, as well as on the categories of the affected data.
DATA CONSERVATION PERIOD.

The data will be kept as long as they are necessary to carry out the procedures and actions entrusted, as well as to execute the other purposes and, in any case, taking into account the legally required deadlines.

Once they are no longer listed as active, they will be deleted or, if necessary, blocked, being accessible only by Judges and Courts, the Public Prosecutor’s Office or the Public Administrations competent to demand the possible responsibilities arising from the treatment, during the limitation period of these. Once this second period has elapsed, they will then be destroyed. All of this and, where applicable, in compliance with art. 32 of the LOPDGDD.
RECIPIENTS: DATA TRANSFERS AND INTERNATIONAL TRANSFERS.
Data transfers are not contemplated, except when they are necessary for compliance with a legal provision or in favor of contractual execution.

Your personal data may be accessed by those in charge of processing that perform a service on behalf of the controller, that is, those service providers that have to access your personal data for functional or operational development in favor of the service to be offered.

In addition, international data transfers are not contemplated. Given the possibility of the existence of such transfers, these will be carried out with the authorization and the precise requirements for this.
SOCIAL NETWORKS.

The data of friends or followers on social networks may be processed by the controller to interact with them and keep them informed of their activities, services and promotions. These data will be processed on the legal basis of your consent and will be kept as long as you remain a “friend” or “follower”, and you may revoke your consent at any time, without affecting the legality of the processing carried out previously. Providing data for this purpose is voluntary, although, if you do not do so, you will not be able to be a “friend” or “follower” on the platforms or media in which the controller operates.
On the other hand, in the event that this website has the option of user registration and this allows

If you choose to register through social networks, the personal data that will be specifically processed for this purpose will come from the social network in question, to which the interested party will have previously provided said data for the purposes set out in its corresponding privacy policies. The categories of data processed and collected from the social network in question would be those that appear in the registration form itself and those relating to the data that you have provided to the aforementioned social network. If, in order to proceed, where appropriate, with registration on this website, more data than those provided by the social network are required, these will be requested and must be completed additionally in said registration form, subject to the applicable privacy conditions.
MINORS.

Minors may not use the services available through the website without the prior authorization of their parents or guardians as legal representatives, who will be solely responsible for all acts carried out through this website by such minors in their care, including the completion of any forms that may exist and the marking, where appropriate, of the boxes that accompany them.

Regarding the specific subject matter of personal data protection, respecting the provisions of articles 8 of the GDPR and 7 of the LOPDGDD, only those over fourteen years of age may give their consent for the processing of their personal data in a lawful manner. If the minor is under fourteen years of age, the consent of the parents or guardians as legal representatives will be necessary for the processing, and this will only be considered lawful to the extent that they have authorized it. In no case or circumstance will data linked to the professional, economic or privacy situation of other family members be obtained from minors without the prior consent of the latter. RIGHTS AND ADDITIONAL INFORMATION ON DATA PROTECTION.

The interested party has the right to obtain confirmation as to whether MD. USE INNOVATIONS, S.L. processes personal data that concerns him/her, as well as to access his/her personal data, request the rectification of inaccurate data or, where appropriate, request its deletion when, among other reasons, the data is no longer necessary for the purposes for which it was collected.
In certain circumstances, the interested party may request the limitation of the processing of his/her data, in which case it will only be kept for the exercise or defense against possible claims.

Likewise, in certain circumstances and for reasons related to his/her particular situation, the interested party may object to the processing of his/her data. MD. USE INNOVATIONS, S.L. will cease processing the data, except for compelling legitimate reasons, or for the exercise or defense against possible claims. Likewise, the interested party has the right to data portability when technically possible and in certain cases.
Furthermore, any consent previously given may be withdrawn at any time.

Furthermore, and where applicable, you have the right not to be subject to decisions based solely on the automated processing of your data, including profiling. In such hypothetical cases of making and taking decisions, you would be duly informed in this regard.

The interested party may raise any questions they consider in relation to this policy, obtain additional information on data protection, as well as exercise their rights in the terms provided for by law, by sending a communication to: MD. USE INNOVATIONS, S.L., Edificio Emprendeia s/n (15706 Santiago de Compostela) or by email to: regafandi@gmail.com, indicating the corresponding request and accompanied by a copy of the DNI or other document proving the identity as regards such right to exercise their rights. In the event that the person acting through representation must also provide a copy of the DNI of the represented party (or equivalent document) and documentation proving the representation of the representative.

You can obtain the models for exercising the various rights in data protection on the website of the Spanish Data Protection Agency. Likewise, you can have access to such models and forms by requesting them directly from the entity itself.
If you consider that your rights have not been properly addressed, you may file a claim with the Spanish Data Protection Agency: www.aepd.es.
Update: SEPTEMBER 2024
